testCaseName: Classes anotadas com @Service devem terminar com Service
name: Classes anotadas com @Service devem terminar com Service

statusDetails.message:
Architecture Violation [Priority: MEDIUM] - Rule 'classes that are annotated with @Service should have simple name ending with 'Service', because Convenção de nomenclatura: services Spring devem ser facilmente identificados pelo sufixo Service.' was violated (1 times):
Class <com.portfolio.assetmanagement.security.service.UserDetailsServiceImpl> does not have simple name ending with 'Service' in (UserDetailsServiceImpl.java:0)
